rationale: Mechanical & Aerospace at L3 splits primarily by physical phenomenon (fluid, solid, heat) and by application area (aerospace, automotive, marine, civil-structural). Aerospace gets 4 leaves because spacecraft, hypersonics, aerospace structures, and GNC are each large enough communities. Additive manufacturing gets 3 leaves matching process families (metal AM, polymer AM, in-situ process monitoring). I treated robotics-mechanical as soft-vs-rigid-vs-medical because the working communities differ.

subfields.name: Elasticity, Plasticity & Finite Deformation
subfields.tagline: Continuum elasticity, plasticity theory, large-deformation mechanics.

subfields.name: Fracture & Fatigue Mechanics
subfields.tagline: Fracture mechanics, fatigue, damage tolerance, ductile and brittle failure.

subfields.name: Contact, Friction & Multi-Scale Mechanics
subfields.tagline: Contact mechanics, tribology, multi-scale solids, micromechanics.

subfields.name: Computational Solid Mechanics & FEM
subfields.tagline: FEM methodology, meshless methods, phase-field for fracture.

subfields.name: Engineering CFD (RANS/LES)
subfields.tagline: RANS/LES for engineering, turbulence modeling, hybrid methods.

subfields.name: Multiphase & Reactive Flow
subfields.tagline: Multiphase flow, dispersed flow, reactive flow, particulate flows.

subfields.name: Microfluidics & Lab-on-Chip Engineering
subfields.tagline: Microfluidic device design, lab-on-chip, droplet-based microfluidics engineering.

subfields.name: Aero/Hydrodynamics (Engineering)
subfields.tagline: Aerodynamics for vehicles and aircraft, hydrodynamics, hull design CFD.

subfields.name: Heat Conduction, Convection & Radiation
subfields.tagline: Heat conduction, natural and forced convection, radiative heat transfer.

subfields.name: Phase-Change Heat Transfer & Two-Phase Cooling
subfields.tagline: Boiling, condensation, phase-change cooling, microscale phase-change.

subfields.name: Electronics Cooling & Thermal Management
subfields.tagline: Electronics cooling, data center thermal, EV thermal management.

subfields.name: Building & HVAC Research
subfields.tagline: Building energy systems, HVAC research, energy-efficient buildings.

subfields.name: Aircraft Design & Aerodynamics
subfields.tagline: Aircraft conceptual design, aerodynamic optimization, eVTOL.

subfields.name: Spacecraft Design & Mission Engineering
subfields.tagline: Spacecraft design, satellite missions, deep-space mission engineering.

subfields.name: Hypersonics & High-Speed Flight
subfields.tagline: Hypersonic vehicles, scramjets, high-temperature aero, ablation.

subfields.name: Guidance, Navigation & Control (Aerospace)
subfields.tagline: Aircraft and spacecraft GNC, autonomous flight, formation flight.

subfields.name: Combustion
subfields.tagline: Combustion theory and experiment, low-NOx combustion, hydrogen/ammonia combustion.

subfields.name: Gas Turbines & Aero/Land-Based Engines
subfields.tagline: Gas turbines, jet engines, land-based GT for power generation.

subfields.name: Electric & Hybrid Propulsion
subfields.tagline: Electric aerospace propulsion, hybrid powertrains, fuel cell vehicles propulsion.

subfields.name: Powder-Bed Fusion (Metal AM)
subfields.tagline: SLM, EBM, DED metal printing, AM process-property research.

subfields.name: Polymer Additive Manufacturing
subfields.tagline: FDM/FFF, vat photopolymerization, multi-material polymer AM.

subfields.name: In-Situ AM Monitoring & Process Control
subfields.tagline: In-situ AM sensing, closed-loop AM control, defect detection in AM.

subfields.name: CNC, Precision Machining & Subtractive
subfields.tagline: Precision CNC, ultra-precision machining, micromachining.

subfields.name: Smart Manufacturing & Industry 4.0
subfields.tagline: Industry 4.0, digital twin for manufacturing, ML for process monitoring.

subfields.name: Structural Engineering (Buildings)
subfields.tagline: Buildings structural design, performance-based design, structural reliability.

subfields.name: Earthquake Engineering & Seismic Design
subfields.tagline: Seismic design, soil-structure interaction, earthquake-resistant structures.

subfields.name: Transportation & Pavement Engineering
subfields.tagline: Transportation systems engineering, pavement engineering, road infrastructure.

subfields.name: Geotechnical Engineering
subfields.tagline: Soil mechanics applied, foundation engineering, geotechnical hazards.

subfields.name: Concrete & Asphalt Materials Engineering
subfields.tagline: Concrete engineering, asphalt and pavement materials, sustainable cement.

subfields.name: Smart Construction Materials & Durability
subfields.tagline: Self-healing concrete, smart construction materials, durability research.

subfields.name: EV Powertrain & Vehicle Dynamics
subfields.tagline: EV powertrain engineering, vehicle dynamics, energy management in vehicles.

subfields.name: Autonomous Vehicle Systems Engineering
subfields.tagline: AV hardware integration, sensor fusion at vehicle level, ADAS engineering.

subfields.name: Soft Robotics & Compliant Mechanisms
subfields.tagline: Soft robotic mechanical design, compliant mechanisms, soft actuators (mech angle).

subfields.name: Exoskeletons & Prosthetics (Mechanical)
subfields.tagline: Exoskeleton mechanical design, prosthetic devices mechanics, assistive robotics design.

subfields.name: Musculoskeletal & Cardiovascular Biomechanics
subfields.tagline: Musculoskeletal biomechanics, cardiovascular biomechanics, biomech imaging.

uncovered_concerns: Marine & Ocean Engineering L2 papers fold under hydrodynamics + structural at L3.
Design, Optimization & Engineering Methodology L2 (topology optimization, generative design) folds under computational solid mechanics + smart manufacturing.
Naval architecture as its own leaf would be plausible if maritime industry papers were larger — folded into hydrodynamics for now.
